examples.title: Algorithm: Chaincode Execution
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the execution of Chaincode in Fabric.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the execution of Chaincode in Fabric. It first gets the Chaincode ID and input parameters, then executes the Chaincode and returns the result.

examples.title: Fabric Example
examples.description: This example demonstrates the creation of a Fabric network and the execution of a Chaincode.
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates the creation of a Fabric network and the execution of a Chaincode. It first creates a Fabric network and a Chaincode, then executes the Chaincode and prints the result.
